tool.name: decompile_apk
tool.description: Decompile Android APK to readable source. method=jadx produces Java source + resources (readable); method=apktool produces smali + resources (closer to bytecode). Output in /workspace/mobile-projects/<name>/<method>/. Parses AndroidManifest.xml for package/version/SDK metadata.

tool.name: decompile_ipa
tool.description: Decompile iOS IPA: unzip Payload, run class-dump for ObjC headers, otool for Mach-O metadata, plist parse for bundle_id/version. method=class-dump / otool / auto.
